rows.source_ref: Trading System and Strategy Review, thread by mrhigurashi (with TheJube, thorn, profitfarmer, kraven), ForexFactory, thread 612863, https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/612863-trading-system-and-strategy-review
rows.concept: A discussion thread inviting unbiased reviews of other traders' systems; it contains opinions and pointers to other threads but no self-contained tradable rule set.
rows.eligibility_reason: Meta/review discussion with no concrete entry/exit/parameter definitions; only references to external threads (a 'fuzzy' trend-pullback system explicitly stated to have no exit strategy, and thread t=590623 described only in generalities) plus generic HH/HL pullback commentary.
rows.notes: Points to other FF threads (post 9224087 trend-pullback system; thread 590623 'simple entry/exit + position management, fixed SL, no martingale') that would be the actual sources if harvested separately, but no rules are reproduced here. kraven's HH/HL break-then-pullback remark is too underspecified to implement.

notes: PDF rendered via pypdf text extraction (poppler/pdftoppm unavailable); text layer complete across all 4 pages.
